excluded_from_xp: cards/OG/pen-misses are variance -> belong in rP, not xP
meta.grain: expected FPL points per player (bootstrap element.id) per FPL event (1-38)

locked_decisions.bonus_bps: per-position OLS on expected returns — ADDED (the calibration gate showed a goalscorer skew from punting)
locked_decisions.clean_sheet: Poisson P(0 conceded) x empirical calibration factor 0.8732 (freq-matching; goals-conceded overdispersed vs Poisson)
locked_decisions.defcon_rate: empirical-Bayes (Poisson-Gamma) shrink toward position mean; sourced from the discrete `defensive_contribution` field (FPL-authoritative, incl. recoveries), thresholds DEF 10 / MID+FWD 12
locked_decisions.gc_penalty: modelled off the CS Poisson: sum_k P(GC=k)*floor(k/2)
locked_decisions.gk_saves: light Poisson on xGOT->save-count chain (SoT_faced - xGOT_faced); soft component / prime ablation candidate

meta.retrospective: actual minutes & fixtures; appearance and >=60' clean-sheet gate use ACTUAL per-match minutes
